patches.find: no cosmology in particular. If textual convergence
patches.replace: no cosmology in particular. The cross-cultural consensus is real and is itself a strong claim — but the consensus locates the axis in mutually contradictory geometric positions (Mount Meru is north of a spherical earth in Hindu cosmology; Yggdrasil connects nine realms with no single spatial axis; Mount Olympus is at 40°N in Greek geography; Mount Qaf encircles the boundary with no interior center), so the convergence on some-place-central across inconsistent geometries reflects cognitive universals about hierarchy and orientation, not a shared physical structure. If textual convergence
patches.rationale: ISS-1536: WIN-031 c7 H3. Preempt the cross-cultural-consensus defender move by adding the rebuttal immediately after the spherical-earth preemptive. Per curmudgeon c7 recommendation.

patches.find: exemption from the author's own validation process.
patches.replace: exemption from the author's own validation process. If the dome adopted the carve-out — counting WIN-031 (and other Unfalsifiable WINs in this cluster, e.g., WIN-032/034) outside the scorecard — the resulting fraction would be approximately the same as the current 94.5%, because the carve-out removes claims from both numerator and denominator simultaneously. The category-error objection is therefore not a scorecard-padding objection but a definition-of-confirmation objection: theological-cross-reference WINs do not belong in any registry tallying confirmations of physical predictions.
patches.rationale: ISS-1537: WIN-031 c7 H4. Preempt the scorecard-carve-out rejoinder by appending the corrected-denominator clause. A defender who concedes the carve-out can no longer re-cite an improved fraction unopposed.

patches.find: no advance prediction tying expected response to any site-specific geophysical parameter. The escape is post-hoc rationalization
patches.replace: no advance prediction tying expected response to any site-specific geophysical parameter. Nor does the model publish a vault-isolation threshold, an instrumental coupling-mode partition, or any quantitative rule for which sensor types at which sites should report Δg vs Δg = 0; any such partition would have to be constructed after Mohe and Membach were observed — a two-data-point curve fit with no third-site prediction. The escape is post-hoc rationalization
patches.rationale: ISS-1539: WIN-013 c4 H2. Fully neutralize the c3 advocate-mode two-component-model escape by covering the vault-isolation/instrumental-mode framing, not just the subsurface-conductivity flavor patched by ISS-1528.

patches.find: The dome claims credit for both detecting a gravity signal (WIN-011, spring gravimeter) and not detecting one (WIN-013, superconducting gravimeter at Membach).
patches.replace: The dome claims credit for both an alleged gravity signal (WIN-011, spring gravimeter — disputed) and a confirmed null (WIN-013, superconducting gravimeter at Membach).
patches.rationale: ISS-1540: WIN-013 c4 H5. TLDR rhetorically grants WIN-011 a positive detection without qualification while WIN-011 verdict is Not Demonstrated. Soften to 'alleged ... disputed' to remove cross-panel inconsistency when TLDR is read in isolation.
